start..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','roomId','ruleset','rulesVersion','seed','tickRate','hostUid','audioOutput','members','players','settings','serverTime']) && newData.child('type').val() == 'game/started' && newData.child('ruleset').val() == 'pill-bottle' && (newData.child('rulesVersion').val() == 'pill-bottle/2' || newData.child('rulesVersion').val() == 'pill-bottle/3') && newData.child('tickRate').val() == 60 && newData.child('seed').isNumber() && newData.child('seed').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('seed').val() >= 0 && newData.child('seed').val() <= 4294967295 && newData.child('roomId').isString() && newData.child('roomId').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('hostUid').isString() && newData.child('hostUid').val().length <= 128 && (newData.child('audioOutput').val() == 'cast' || newData.child('audioOutput').val() == 'controllers') && (!newData.child('matchId').exists() || (newData.child('matchId').isString() && newData.child('matchId').val().length <= 128)) && (!newData.child('round').exists() || (newData.child('round').isNumber() && newData.child('round').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('round').val() >= 0 && newData.child('round').val() <= 2)) && (!newData.child('previousGameId').exists() || (newData.child('previousGameId').isString() && newData.child('previousGameId').val().length <= 128)) && newData.child('members').child(auth.uid).val() == true && newData.child('players').hasChildren() && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber()

$playerId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['seat']) && newData.child('seat').isNumber() && newData.child('seat').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('seat').val() >= 0 && newData.child('seat').val() <= 3 && newData.parent().parent().child('members').child($playerId).val() == true

settings..validate: (newData.parent().child('rulesVersion').val() == 'pill-bottle/2' && newData.hasChildren(['virusCount','speed','hardDrop']) && newData.child('virusCount').val() == 12 && newData.child('speed').val() == 'medium' && newData.child('hardDrop').val() == true) || (newData.parent().child('rulesVersion').val() == 'pill-bottle/3' && newData.hasChildren(['initialVirusCount','initialGravityTicks','hardDrop']) && newData.child('initialVirusCount').val() == 5 && newData.child('initialGravityTicks').val() == 50 && newData.child('hardDrop').val() == true && (!newData.child('matchRounds').exists() || newData.child('matchRounds').val() == 3))

$recordId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','playerId','epochId','clientSeq','tick','serverTime']) && newData.child('playerId').val() == $playerId && newData.child('epochId').isString() && newData.child('epochId').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('clientSeq').isNumber() && newData.child('clientSeq').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('clientSeq').val() >= 1 && newData.child('clientSeq').val() <= 1000000000 && newData.child('tick').isNumber() && newData.child('tick').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('tick').val() >= 0 && newData.child('tick').val() <= 1000000000 && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber() && ((newData.child('type').val() == 'input/move' && newData.child('payload/dx').isNumber() && (newData.child('payload/dx').val() == -1 || newData.child('payload/dx').val() == 1)) || (newData.child('type').val() == 'input/rotate' && (newData.child('payload/direction').val() == 'clockwise' || newData.child('payload/direction').val() == 'counterclockwise')) || ((newData.child('type').val() == 'input/soft-drop-start' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/soft-drop-end' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/hard-drop') && !newData.child('payload').exists()) || (newData.child('type').val() == 'progress/tick' && newData.child('payload').hasChildren(['phase','stateHash']) && newData.child('payload/stateHash').isString() && ((root.child('games/'+$gameId+'/start/rulesVersion').val() == 'pill-bottle/2' && (newData.child('payload/phase').val() == 'playing' || newData.child('payload/phase').val() == 'won' || newData.child('payload/phase').val() == 'lost') && newData.child('payload/stateHash').val().matches(/^pb2-[0-9a-f]{8}$/)) || (root.child('games/'+$gameId+'/start/rulesVersion').val() == 'pill-bottle/3' && (newData.child('payload/phase').val() == 'playing' || newData.child('payload/phase').val() == 'countdown' || newData.child('payload/phase').val() == 'lost') && newData.child('payload/stateHash').val().matches(/^pb3-[0-9a-f]{8}$/)))) || (newData.child('type').val() == 'attack/rain' && newData.child('payload').hasChildren(['attackId','colors','columns']) && newData.child('payload/attackId').isString() && newData.child('payload/attackId').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('payload/colors').hasChildren(['0','1']) && newData.child('payload/columns').hasChildren(['0','1']) && !newData.child('payload/colors/4').exists() && !newData.child('payload/columns/4').exists() && newData.child('payload/colors/2').exists() == newData.child('payload/columns/2').exists() && newData.child('payload/colors/3').exists() == newData.child('payload/columns/3').exists()))

$commandId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','playerId','epochId','clientSeq','tick','serverTime']) && newData.child('playerId').val() == $playerId && newData.child('epochId').isString() && newData.child('epochId').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('clientSeq').isNumber() && newData.child('clientSeq').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('clientSeq').val() >= 1 && newData.child('clientSeq').val() <= 1000000000 && newData.child('tick').isNumber() && newData.child('tick').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('tick').val() >= 0 && newData.child('tick').val() <= 1000000000 && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber() && ((newData.child('type').val() == 'input/move' && newData.child('payload/dx').isNumber() && (newData.child('payload/dx').val() == -1 || newData.child('payload/dx').val() == 1)) || (newData.child('type').val() == 'input/rotate' && (newData.child('payload/direction').val() == 'clockwise' || newData.child('payload/direction').val() == 'counterclockwise')) || ((newData.child('type').val() == 'input/soft-drop-start' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/soft-drop-end' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/hard-drop') && !newData.child('payload').exists()))

progress..validate: newData.hasChildren(['epochId','tick','lastClientSeq','stateHash','phase','serverTime']) && newData.child('epochId').isString() && newData.child('epochId').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('tick').isNumber() && newData.child('tick').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('tick').val() >= 0 && newData.child('tick').val() <= 1000000000 && newData.child('lastClientSeq').isNumber() && newData.child('lastClientSeq').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('lastClientSeq').val() >= 0 && newData.child('stateHash').isString() && newData.child('stateHash').val().matches(/^pb[23]-[0-9a-f]{8}$/) && (newData.child('phase').val() == 'playing' || newData.child('phase').val() == 'countdown' || newData.child('phase').val() == 'won' || newData.child('phase').val() == 'lost') && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber()

$attackId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','attackId','sourcePlayerId','sourceTick','sourceChain','targetPlayerIds','colors','serverTime']) && newData.child('type').val() == 'attack/generated' && newData.child('attackId').isString() && newData.child('attackId').val().length <= 128 && newData.child('sourcePlayerId').isString() && newData.child('sourceTick').isNumber() && newData.child('sourceTick').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('sourceTick').val() >= 0 && newData.child('sourceChain').isNumber() && newData.child('sourceChain').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('sourceChain').val() >= 1 && newData.child('targetPlayerIds/0').exists() && !newData.child('targetPlayerIds/3').exists() && newData.child('colors').hasChildren(['0','1']) && !newData.child('colors/4').exists() && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber()

$playerId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','playerId','tick','result','stateHash','serverTime']) && newData.child('type').val() == 'player/terminal' && newData.child('playerId').val() == $playerId && newData.child('tick').isNumber() && newData.child('tick').val() % 1 == 0 && newData.child('tick').val() >= 0 && (newData.child('result').val() == 'cleared' || newData.child('result').val() == 'lost') && newData.child('stateHash').isString() && newData.child('stateHash').val().matches(/^pb3-[0-9a-f]{8}$/) && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber()
